prompt: A powerful emotional scene showing thousands of empty chairs fading into darkness, symbolizing lives lost during a global pandemic. The chairs gradually disappear into shadows, creating a sense of scale and loss. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, minimal color palette, somber mood, no text, no labels, no charts. Visual metaphor for millions of deaths. Ultra realistic, 4k, highly detailed.
dataset_name: COVID-19 Deaths - Our World in Data
insight: Millions of deaths during COVID-19 represent real human lives lost, not just numbers.
